delta_entries.change_body: The payment_method_types parameter on PaymentIntent.create() is deprecated. Pass payment_method_configuration instead. Existing integrations will continue to work until the next major release, but new features will only be available via payment_method_configuration.

The capture_method value 'automatic' on PaymentIntent has been renamed to 'automatic_async' to better reflect its behaviour. Passing 'automatic' will raise an invalid_request_error starting in API version 2026-01-01. Update all PaymentIntent.create() calls that set capture_method='automatic'.

delta_classifications.rationale: The payment_method_types parameter is being deprecated in favor of payment_method_configuration, but existing integrations continue to work until the next major release. Risk is low since no immediate breakage occurs.

Renaming capture_method 'automatic' to 'automatic_async' is a breaking change that will cause invalid_request_error for any integration passing the old value starting with API version 2026-01-01. All affected PaymentIntent.create() calls must be updated.
